title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Declaration of Gaborone Township As a City Order
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Declaration of Gaborone Township As a City Order

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Declaration of Gaborone Township as a City Order.
*Originally made under the Township Act now repealed, these Regulations have been continued under s 94(2) of the Local Government Act, 2013.

provisions.title: Declaration of Gaborone Township as a City
provisions.content:
2. Declaration of Gaborone Township as a City
The area defined as the Gaborone Township in the Declaration of Township Order is hereby declared to be a city, the boundaries of which are set out in the Schedule hereto.
